zh.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge是Robert Oxenbridge的兒子，於大約1428年出生在英國素可布雷德。他於1450年與Anne Lyvelode在英國素可布雷德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1487年3月9日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國素可布雷德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge是Robert Oxenbridge的儿子，于大约1428年出生在英国素可布雷德。他于1450年与Anne Lyvelode在英国素可布雷德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1487年3月9日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国素可布雷德。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge was born about 1428, in Brede, Sussex, England as the son of Robert Oxenbridge. He married Anne Lyvelode in 1450, in Brede, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 9 March 1487, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Brede, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge est né environ 1428, à Brede, Sussex, Angleterre, fils de Robert Oxenbridge. Il a épousé Anne Lyvelode en 1450, à Brede, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 9 mars 1487, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Brede, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge wurde um 1428 in Brede, Sussex, England, als Sohn von Robert Oxenbridge geboren. Er hat 1450 in Brede, Sussex, England Anne Lyvelode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 9. März 1487 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Brede, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge è nato il circa 1428 nel Brede, Sussex, England come figlio di Robert Oxenbridge. Lui sposato Anne Lyvelode nel 1450, nel Brede, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 marzo 1487, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Brede, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridgeは約1428年にイギリススセックスブレドでRobert Oxenbridgeの息子として生まれた。1450年にイギリススセックスブレドでAnne Lyvelodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1487年3月9日に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリススセックスブレドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge(은)는 대략 1428년 영국 수세스 브레드에서 Robert Oxenbridge의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1450년 영국 수세스 브레드에서 Anne Lyvelode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1487년 3월 9일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 브레드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge nasceu aproximadamente 1428, em Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra filho de Robert Oxenbridge. Ele casou-se com Anne Lyvelode em 1450, em Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de março de 1487, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge родился около 1428 г. в местности бред, суссекс, Англия. Его отца звали Robert Oxenbridge. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Lyvelode в 1450 г. в местности бред, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 9 марта 1487 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности бред, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Oxenbridge nació aproximadamente 1428, en Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert Oxenbridge. Se casó con Anne Lyvelode en 1450, en Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1487, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Brede, Sussex, Inglaterra.
